extra.reasoning:
The input variable leg_swelling does not appear in any of the 8 rules (r1-r8) nor in the default assignment. The rules reference only back_pain, dyspnea, syncope, stiff_neck, vision_loss, abdominal_pain, slurred_speech, and severe_headache. The default (acuity := routine) applies only when no rule fires, which also depends solely on those 8 other inputs.

Therefore, holding every other input fixed and flipping leg_swelling from false to true cannot change the set of matching rules, cannot change which rule wins under priority/order conflict resolution, and cannot change whether the default applies. The output acuity is identical before and after. Identical acuity is trivially 'no lower than before,' so the monotonicity property (setting leg_swelling true never lowers acuity) holds for the entire input space. leg_swelling is an inert variable with respect to acuity.
